beat: Present — Mira feels the pulse under Commons cobbles
artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE with CLEAR PANEL GRID and white gutters. Layout: TOP wide establishing panel (full width) of Riftwild Commons timber plaza at dusk, amber lanterns, cobbles with a faint cyan hairline crack. BOTTOM row: two equal panels — left close-up of Mira Eggwarden (young hatchery mentor, practical robes, egg-care satchel) kneeling, palm on vibrating stone; right medium shot of the plaza crack glowing cyan under her boots. Thick black panel borders, consistent gutter width, Z-path reading left-to-right then down. Characters INSIDE panels only — NO floating portrait cards, NO collage insets, NO lore-plate overlays. Painterly comic, earth tones, cyan accent. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, balloons, captions, logos, or UI in the art.

lines.text: Riftwild Commons. Dusk. The cobbles remember a scream the town pretends was weather.

lines.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
lines.text: That's not a cart. That's a pulse.

lines.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
lines.text: Compact law says invite. It doesn't say ignore the floor when it answers.
